title: Pearl River Valley Electric Power Association ransomware incident

victim.name: Pearl River Valley Electric Power Association

extortion.description: PRVEPA is an electric cooperative dedicated to providing safe, dependable, and affordable power to the residents of South-Central Mississippi since 1938.We will upload 62gb of corporate documents soon. Employee data (driver licenses, phones, addresses, emails), confidential technologies, financials and accounting, contracts and agreements, clients' information, NDA, etc.
